transcript: Speaker A (Husband): ಕಾಲ್ ಯಾರ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದಾರೋ ಸ್ವಲ್ಪ ನೋಡ್ತಿಯಾ [Can you see who is calling?] Speaker B (Wife): Hello... yes, that works for us. No, we don't use a credit card. We prefer to manage expenses carefully and avoid unnecessary debt. All right, thank you. Speaker A (Husband): ಸೂಪರ್ ಕಣೆ ಎಷ್ಟು ಕಾನ್ಫಿಡೆಂಟ್ ಆಗಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಅಲ್ಲಿ ಮಾತಾಡ್ದೆ [Super! You spoke so confidently in English.] Speaker C (Son): ಹೌದು ಅಮ್ಮ ಎಷ್ಟು ಸಕ್ಕತ್ತಾಗಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಅಲ್ಲಿ ಮಾತಾಡಿದಿರಾ [Yes mom, you spoke so beautifully in English.] Speaker A (Husband): ಆದ್ರೆ ಇದೆಲ್ಲ ಹೇಗೆ ಸಾಧ್ಯ ಆಯ್ತು? [But how was all this possible?] Speaker B (Wife): ಇದೆಲ್ಲ My Sivi ಆಪ್ ಇಂದ ರೀ. [This is all because of My Sivi app.] ಅದ್ರಲ್ಲಿ AI ಟೀಚರ್ ಇರ್ತಾರೆ. [There is an AI teacher in it.] ಅವ್ರು ಯಾವಾಗ ಬೇಕಾದ್ರೂ ಕನ್ನಡದಿಂದಲೇ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಳ್ಸ್ತಾರೆ. [They teach English from Kannada whenever you want.] Speaker A (Husband): ಹೌದಾ ನನಗೆ ನಂಬೋಕೆ ಆಗ್ತಿಲ್ಲ ಕಣೆ. ಇದಕ್ಕೆ ಎಷ್ಟು ಖರ್ಚು ಆಯ್ತು? [Really? I can't believe it. How much did this cost?] Speaker B (Wife): ನೀವು ಓದ್ತಿರೋ newspaper ಗಿಂತಲೂ ಕಮ್ಮಿ. [Less than the newspaper you are reading.] ಬರೀ ಒಂದು ರೂಪಾಯಿ ಅಷ್ಟೇ. [Just one rupee.] Speaker C (Son): ಹಾಗಾದ್ರೆ ನಾನು ಇವಾಗ್ಲೇ ಜಾಯಿನ್ ಆಗ್ತೀನಿ. [Then I will join right now.] Speaker A (Husband): ನಾನು ಕೂಡ. [Me too.] Speaker B (Wife): ಹಾಗಾದ್ರೆ ಇವಾಗ್ಲೇ ಇನ್ಸ್ಟಾಲ್ ಬಟನ್ ಪ್ರೆಸ್ ಮಾಡಿ My Sivi ಆಪ್ ಅಲ್ಲಿ ಸೈನ್ ಅಪ್ ಆಗಿ. [Then press the install button right now and sign up on My Sivi app.] Speaker D (Voiceover): Click on Install Now and download MySivi app.

summary: An animated family is amazed when the mother speaks fluent English on a phone call. She explains she learned it using the MySivi app's AI teacher, which costs only 1 rupee for 3 days. The family decides to install the app immediately.
